State board shall determine the specified dollar amount used in subsection (a) for purposes of determining the local option budget of a school district.

The board of education of a school district may adopt a local option budget that does not exceed the local option budget calculated as if the school district received state aid for special education and related services equal to the amount of state aid for special education and related services received in this school year.
